ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "matriculation_number" TEXT /* Matriculation number of the student */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the program */,
  "expected_graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., B.Eng., BBA) */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Total duration of the program in years */,
  "total_credits" INTEGER /* Total number of credits required for the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "min_gpa" REAL /* Minimum GPA required for the program */,
  "tuition_fee" REAL /* Tuition fee for the program */,
  "academic_requirements" TEXT /* Additional academic requirements for the program */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Admission requirements for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the university is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the university */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the university */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the university */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the university */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the university */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit transfer agreement */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program involved in the transfer */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university involved in the transfer */,
  "transfer_terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the credit transfer */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Date from which the transfer is valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* Date until which the transfer is valid */,
  "min_gpa_for_transfer" REAL /* Minimum GPA required for the credit transfer */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fees associated with the credit transfer */,
  "additional_requirements" TEXT /* Additional requirements for the credit transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_transfers_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_transfers_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student transfer */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student involved in the transfer */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "credits_transferred" INTEGER /* Number of credits transferred */,
  "transfer_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the transfer */,
  "transfer_status" TEXT /* Status of the transfer (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "transfer_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the transfer */,
  "transfer_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_transfers_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the course belongs to */,
  "semester_offered" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "classroom" TEXT /* Classroom where the course is held */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_courses" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being taken */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the course enrollment (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "attendance" TEXT /* Attendance record of the student in the course */,
  "final_exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the final exam for the course */,
  "midterm_exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the midterm exam for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester for which the financial record applies */,
  "tuition_fee" REAL /* Tuition fee for the semester */,
  "scholarship_amount" REAL /* Scholarship amount received */,
  "balance_due" REAL /* Balance due after scholarships */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "scholarship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scholarship applied for the semester */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scholarships" (
  "scholarship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scholarship */,
  "scholarship_name" TEXT /* Name of the scholarship */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the scholarship */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the scholarship */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Application deadline for the scholarship */,
  "awarded_by" TEXT /* Entity awarding the scholarship */,
  "application_form" TEXT /* URL or path to the application form */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the scholarship application (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scholarship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_scholarships" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scholarship award */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the scholarship */,
  "scholarship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scholarship awarded */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the scholarship was awarded */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the scholarship awarded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the scholarship (e.g., awarded, pending, rejected) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the student applied for the scholarship */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the scholarship is up for renewal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_scholarships_scholarship_id FOREIGN KEY ("scholarship_id") REFERENCES scholarships ("scholarship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_scholarships_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "last_password_reset" TEXT /* Date of the last password reset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., student profile, financials) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic advisor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the advisor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the advisor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the advisor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the advisor */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the advisor is responsible for */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the advisor's office */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the advisor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Academic specialization of the advisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_advisors_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_advisors" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisor assignment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic advisor */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the advisor was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the advisor assignment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "next_meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the next meeting between the student and the advisor */,
  "meeting_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the meetings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_advisors_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES academic_advisors ("advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_advisors_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
